description.value: Price 18,300 gp; Slot armor; CL 15th; Weight 30 lbs.; Aura strong abjuration DESCRIPTION This suit of +1 steel lamellar armor grants its wearer spell resistance against divine spells equal to 5 + the wearerâs base attack bonus. It also protects the wearer from heat dangers as if she were affected by a continuous endure elements spell. Additionally, once per day when the wearer of a suit of armor of the Pure Legion fails a Will save against a mind-affecting spell cast by a divine spellcaster, she can attempt another save as a free action on the following round to end the spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 9,300 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells endure elements, mind blank
